description: You are an Operations Research Analyst at a major hospital network. The current Python optimization script (built with Google OR-Tools) for the monthly nursing schedule in /home/ga/workspace/nurse_scheduling/ is generating illegal and suboptimal schedules that violate labor union contracts and hospital coverage minimums. Fix the mathematical constraints and objective function logic in schedule_model.py to comply with the 5 hospital scheduling rules defined in README_RULES.md. Generate a legal, optimal schedule and save it to /home/ga/workspace/nurse_scheduling/schedule.csv.
